info.title: Adaptix Core Service
info.description: Shared runtime infrastructure for the Adaptix platform: authentication, audit logging, event bus, tenant management, and cross-cutting runtime systems.

post.summary: Authenticate user and issue session token.
post.description:
Authenticate a user and return a signed RS256 JWT session token.

Args:
    body: Login credentials and tenant slug.
    session: Injected async database session.

Returns:
    dict with ``token``, ``expires_at``, and ``user`` fields.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 401 on invalid credentials, locked account, or inactive tenant.
    HTTPException: 500 if the JWT private key is not configured.

schema.title: Response Login Api V1 Core Auth Login Post

post.description:
Revoke the session identified by the presented JWT's JTI claim.

Args:
    ctx: Resolved auth context from the Authorization header.
    session: Injected async database session.

Returns:
    dict with ``status: "logged_out"``.

schema.title: Response Logout Api V1 Core Auth Logout Post

get.summary: Validate the current token and return user info.
get.description:
Return the authenticated user's identity from the presented token.

Args:
    ctx: Resolved auth context from the Authorization header.
    session: Injected async database session.

Returns:
    dict with ``user_id``, ``tenant_id``, ``email``, ``role``, ``roles``
    (single-element list), ``exp``, and ``jti``.

schema.title: Response Validate Token Api V1 Core Auth Validate Get

get.description:
Return database connectivity status.

Returns:
    dict with ``status`` (``"ok"`` or ``"unavailable"``) and ``detail``.

schema.title: Response Health Api V1 Core Health Get

post.description:
Create a new user within the authenticated admin's tenant.

Args:
    body: New user fields including email, full_name, role, and password.
    ctx: Resolved auth context — must be admin role.
    session: Injected async database session.

Returns:
    dict with the created user's ``id``, ``email``, ``full_name``, ``role``,
    and ``tenant_id``.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 403 if caller is not admin.
    HTTPException: 409 if email already exists in the tenant.
    HTTPException: 400 on invalid role or other validation failure.

schema.title: Response Create User Api V1 Core Users Post

get.summary: List users for the authenticated tenant.
get.description:
List users belonging to the authenticated user's tenant.

Args:
    role: Optional role filter.
    is_active: Optional active state filter.
    limit: Maximum number of results.
    offset: Pagination offset.
    ctx: Resolved auth context providing tenant isolation.
    session: Injected async database session.

Returns:
    dict with ``items`` list and ``total`` count.

schema.title: Response List Users Api V1 Core Users Get

get.description:
Retrieve a user record by UUID, scoped to the caller's tenant.

Args:
    user_id: UUID of the user to retrieve.
    ctx: Resolved auth context providing tenant isolation.
    session: Injected async database session.

Returns:
    dict with user fields.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 404 if the user does not exist within the tenant.

schema.title: Response Get User Api V1 Core Users  User Id  Get

get.summary: List audit log entries for the authenticated tenant.
get.description:
List audit log entries scoped to the authenticated user's tenant.

Args:
    action: Optional filter by action string.
    resource_type: Optional filter by resource type.
    user_id: Optional filter by actor UUID.
    limit: Maximum results.
    offset: Pagination offset.
    ctx: Resolved auth context providing tenant isolation.
    session: Injected async database session.

Returns:
    dict with ``items`` list and ``total`` count.

schema.title: Response List Audit Logs Api V1 Core Audit Get

get.summary: Get a specific audit log entry.
get.description:
Retrieve a single audit log entry by UUID, scoped to the caller's tenant.

Args:
    log_id: UUID of the audit log entry to retrieve.
    ctx: Resolved auth context providing tenant isolation.
    session: Injected async database session.

Returns:
    Full audit log entry dict.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 404 if the entry does not exist within the tenant.

schema.title: Response Get Audit Log Api V1 Core Audit  Log Id  Get

post.description:
Publish a cross-domain event to the core event bus.

Args:
    body: Event type, source domain, payload, and optional correlation ID.
    ctx: Resolved auth context providing tenant isolation.
    session: Injected async database session.

Returns:
    dict with the persisted event's ``id`` and ``published_at``.

schema.title: Response Publish Event Api V1 Core Events Post

get.summary: List events for the authenticated tenant.
get.description:
List event bus messages for the authenticated tenant.

Args:
    event_type: Optional filter by event type string.
    source_domain: Optional filter by source domain string.
    limit: Maximum results.
    offset: Pagination offset.
    ctx: Resolved auth context providing tenant isolation.
    session: Injected async database session.

Returns:
    dict with ``items`` list.

schema.title: Response List Events Api V1 Core Events Get

post.summary: Mark an event as successfully delivered.
post.description:
Mark a pending event as delivered.

Args:
    event_id: UUID of the event to mark as delivered.
    ctx: Resolved auth context (tenant isolation enforced implicitly via event lookup).
    session: Injected async database session.

Returns:
    dict with ``status: "delivered"``.

schema.title: Response Mark Event Delivered Api V1 Core Events  Event Id  Delivered Post

post.summary: Mark an event as failed with error detail.
post.description:
Mark a pending event as failed and record the error message.

Args:
    event_id: UUID of the event to mark as failed.
    body: Error description.
    ctx: Resolved auth context.
    session: Injected async database session.

Returns:
    dict with ``status: "failed"``.

schema.title: Response Mark Event Failed Api V1 Core Events  Event Id  Failed Post

get.description:
Retrieve tenant information by UUID.

Only accessible to admin-role users. The caller's tenant context must
match the requested tenant_id to prevent cross-tenant data leakage.

Args:
    tenant_id: UUID of the tenant to retrieve.
    ctx: Resolved auth context — must be admin role.
    session: Injected async database session.

Returns:
    dict with tenant fields.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 403 if caller is not admin.
    HTTPException: 403 if the requested tenant does not match the caller's tenant.
    HTTPException: 404 if the tenant does not exist.

schema.title: Response Get Tenant Api V1 Core Tenants  Tenant Id  Get

get.summary: Aggregate counts for the authenticated tenant.
get.description:
Return aggregate counts for users, today's audit logs, and event bus status.

Args:
    ctx: Resolved auth context providing tenant isolation.
    session: Injected async database session.

Returns:
    dict with ``users_by_role`` (dict), ``audit_logs_today`` (int), and
    ``events_by_status`` (dict).

schema.title: Response Get Summary Api V1 Core Summary Get

get.summary: List audit log entries for a tenant via header.
get.description:
List audit log entries for a tenant supplied via the X-Tenant-ID header.

Args:
    limit: Max entries returned (capped at 200).
    offset: Pagination offset.
    action: Optional action type filter.
    x_tenant_id: Tenant identifier from header (required, must be valid UUID).
    session: Database session.

Returns:
    dict: Paginated audit log entries with ``items``, ``count``, ``offset``,
    and ``limit`` keys.

Raises:
    HTTPException 400: Missing or invalid X-Tenant-ID.
    HTTPException 500: Database error.

schema.title: Response List Audit Log Api V1 Core Audit Log Get

post.summary: Authenticate user and issue session token (gateway alias).
post.description:
Authenticate a user and return a signed RS256 JWT session token.

Args:
    body: Login credentials and tenant slug.
    session: Injected async database session.

Returns:
    dict with ``token``, ``expires_at``, and ``user`` fields.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 401 on invalid credentials, locked account, or inactive tenant.
    HTTPException: 500 if the JWT private key is not configured.

schema.title: Response Login Api V1 Auth Login Post

post.summary: Revoke the current session token (gateway alias).
post.description:
Revoke the session identified by the presented JWT's JTI claim.

Args:
    ctx: Resolved auth context from the Authorization header.
    session: Injected async database session.

Returns:
    dict with ``status: "logged_out"``.

schema.title: Response Logout Api V1 Auth Logout Post

get.summary: Validate the current token and return user info (gateway alias).
get.description:
Return the authenticated user's identity from the presented token.

Args:
    ctx: Resolved auth context from the Authorization header.
    session: Injected async database session.

Returns:
    dict with ``user_id``, ``tenant_id``, ``email``, ``role``, ``roles``
    (single-element list), ``exp``, and ``jti``.

schema.title: Response Validate Token Api V1 Auth Validate Get

get.description:
Return database connectivity status for liveness probing.

Returns:
    dict with ``status`` and ``detail`` fields reflecting real database state.

role.title: Role
role.description: Role: admin | operator | viewer | billing_admin | field_user.
